analysis_commentary: REPLICATE of current-best params (build 349 → now build 352): 132 steps vs 344, first probe t=137s (300k buffer fill takes a long time under slow throughput). Trajectory is stable and non-collapsing — max bounded [0.023, 0.052], pEnt=6.83, grad norm 73 — but illegal stayed 0.990-0.999 (vs best's 0.235) because the slower throughput leaves no room to learn in 600s. Build drifted and goal metric much worse — regressed per skill guidance. Upshot: the accepted-best goalposts are unreachable under build 352 in a 10-min window.
